hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push|netlify[[:space:]]+deploy' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Déploiement détecté (git push / netlify deploy). Règle Christophe : jamais déployer sans son accord explicite. Confirmer ?"}}' || true
